team_name: TenderSaarthi: Explainable Multilingual AI for Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis
summary: Design an AI platform that can understand tenders, evaluate eligibility of bidders, and produce explainable evaluation reports. The platform supports multilingual documents and uses a rule-based approach for criteria matching.
optimization_claims: Reduced risk of errors and inconsistencies
constraints_addressed: Difficulty in maintaining an audit trail
